torch_pattern: for b in range(batch_size): cache[b, :, update_idxs[b], :] = x[:, b]  # in-place scatter of one decode-step K/V token into pre-allocated cache slot; with paging: cache[page_table[b, update_idxs[b] // block_size], :, update_idxs[b] % block_size, :] = x[:, b]

config_template.input_shape: [{SEQ}=1, {BATCH}, {N_KV_HEADS}, {HEAD_DIM}]  # one decode token per user, layout 1BKD
config_template.update_idxs_tensor: int32 tensor of shape [{BATCH}] holding per-user write positions (persistent device buffer, refreshed via copy_host_to_device_tensor to keep traces position-agnostic)
config_template.page_table: optional int32 tensor [{BATCH}, {MAX_BLOCKS_PER_SEQ}]; pass None/omit for contiguous (non-paged) cache
config_template.mesh_coords: optional set of ttnn.MeshCoordinate to restrict update to mesh rows (used with 2D-sharded caches)

applicability_notes: Decode-path KV-cache writer. Always appears as two sibling calls (K cache then V cache) immediately before scaled_dot_product_attention_decode / paged SDPA decode; the K+V pair can be merged into ttnn.experimental.paged_fused_update_cache when both inputs are available (see call sites guarded by 'if fused'). Trace-safe because position is read from update_idxs_tensor on device.; torch_pattern_source: test torch reference ('Torch reference implementation' block + from_paged_cache inverse mapping in unit tests); golden_src not registered; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.experimental.paged_update_cache(cache, x, update_idxs_tensor=update_idxs, page_table=page_table)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: persistent KV cache [max_batch or num_blocks, n_kv_heads, max_seq_len or block_size, head_dim], lifetime = whole generation
placement_observations.source: unit test: tt_cache created with memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG, mesh_mapper=ttnn.ShardTensorToMesh(mesh_device, dim=0)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: single decode step: [1, batch, n_kv_heads, head_dim] (1BKD)

memory_config.shard_spec_template: batch-sharded across cores: shard = [{N_KV_HEADS_PADDED_TO_TILE}, {HEAD_DIM}] per user (q_sharded_mem / kv_mem_cfg / sdpa_batch_sharded_memcfg)

placement_observations.source: call sites: 'tt_k = ttnn.to_memory_config(tt_k, q_sharded_mem)' and 'key_states = ttnn.interleaved_to_sharded(key_states, sdpa_batch_sharded_memcfg)' immediately before paged_update_cache
unit test: created with dtype=ttnn.int32 on device; model docstring: 'persistent buffer that we copy_host_to_device_tensor into per step' to keep a single metal trace valid across positions

call sites: 'if page_table is not None: ttnn.experimental.paged_update_cache(..., page_table=page_table) else: ttnn.experimental.paged_update_cache(...)' — page_table only supplied when paged attention is enabled
